evidence.quote: Mouse embryonic stem cells (mESCs) were cultured by StemCell Technologies Inc. (Cambridge, UK).

Nuclear extraction was performed with isotonic buffer containing 10mM Tris-HCl, 10mM NaCl, 1.5mM MgCl2, 0.34M Sucrose, 1mM dithiothreitol (DTT), Halt Protease inhibitors (Thermo Scientific) and 0.05% NP-40. Nuclei were lysed for 10 minutes on ice with lysis buffer composed of 50 mM TrisHCl pH 8.0, 450 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT, Halt Protease inhibitors (Thermo Scientific).

Protein G-Dynabeads (#10004D, Invitrogen) were prepared by coupling to antibodies... IP was performed from 10-60 mg protein depending on the experiment for 1–2 hours at 4°C. NaCl was diluted to 150mM for immunoprecipitation (IP) for experiments 1-3 and 5, but kept at 450mM for experiment 4.
The strategy was based on immunoprecipitation of Arid1a, considered to be a scaffolding/bridging component of the complex (Han et al., 2020; He et al., 2020; Mashtalir et al., 2018)

Crosslinking reagent disuccinimidyl sulfoxide (DSSO) (#A33545, ThermoFisher) was dissolved in DMSO at 50mM. The crosslinking was performed at 1mM (experiments 1-4) or 5mM (experiment 5)... with DMSO final concentration being 2% at RT for 1 hour. The reaction was quenched with 125mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 at RT for 15 minutes.
An increase of ~1.8 times in crosslinks was observed.

The beads were washed three times with IPP150 (150mM NaCl, 10mM Tris-HCl, 0.1% NP40)... modified digestion schedule: Lys C digestion overnight, followed by Trypsin for approximately 4 hours, two times and a Trypsin overnight digestion.
Peptides generated by trypsin digestion were fractionated with the Pierce High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit (#84868, ThermoFisher)... and eight fractions were collected and dried.

Liquid chromatography mass spectrometry (LC-MS) analysis was performed on the Dionex UltiMate 3000 UHPLC system coupled with the Orbitrap Lumos Mass Spectrometer... EASY-Spray C18 capillary column (75 μm×50 cm, 2 μm)... gradient... 300 nL/min... MS scans were acquired at a mass resolution of 120,000

MS raw data from mESCs. IPs was analysed using Proteome Discoverer 2.4... XLinkX was used to search crosslinked peptides pairs... at 1% FDR. Precursor mass tolerance set to 20ppm... searches were performed against full UniProt Mouse database (August 2019) together with cRAP contaminant database.
We detected 24 unique XL sites and a total of 121 CSMs across all five experiments.
Structural models of Bclaf1 and Thrap3 were predicted by Robetta online tool with TrRefineRosetta modelling method for Bclaf1, and comparative modelling and ab initio modelling for Thrap3

five predicted structures were rendered for each protein. In all models Thrap3 appeared to be largely unfolded and flexible... stretching from 330-725aa... predicted structures for Bclaf1 appeared generally much more folded
visualised using UCSF Chimera package... crosslinks were mapped using a Chimera plug-in Xlink Analyzer
5 out of the 5 crosslinks we detected satisfied the more restrictive distance threshold of 32 Å... in models 2, 3 and 5, whilst 4 out 5 did in models 1 and 4.
We utilised available Erh homodimer protein structure PDB:1WZ7... self-link at the position 90 involves two Erh molecules.
